name: Improper Neutralization of Escape, Meta, or Control Sequences
description: The product does not properly neutralize escape sequences, meta characters, or control sequences in user input before sending it to a downstream component, allowing attackers to alter terminal behavior, inject commands through ANSI escape codes, or manipulate protocol control sequences.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing escape sequences (ANSI, terminal control, backslash escapes) that flows to EGRESS[terminal|log|protocol] without a TRANSFORM[escape_strip] that removes or encodes control and escape sequences before output
